global_description: A slender, elongated waterbird with a long neck and sharp, pointed bill. It features a striking black and white plumage with a distinctive black cap and white face. The body is streamlined with a gray back and white underparts, and it has red eyes.

part_details.head: Black cap with a sharp contrast to the white face, featuring red eyes.
part_details.bill: Long, slender, and pointed, yellow in color.
part_details.neck: Long and slender, primarily white with a black stripe running down the back.
part_details.body: Streamlined with a gray back and white underparts.
part_details.legs: Set far back on the body, aiding in swimming.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head, contrasting with the white face.
The long neck extends from the body, supporting the head.
The sharp bill protrudes from the front of the face.
The gray back transitions into white underparts.
